title: Completion Record
description: Validates the content of a completion-record artifact. Summarizes the final state of issue completion including coverage, gaps, and merge reference.

behavior-coverage-summary.description: Summary of how behavior coverage was achieved.

gaps.description: Known gaps or limitations. May be empty if none exist.

merge-reference.description: Reference to the merge commit or pull request.

closure-confirmation.description: Confirmation statement that the issue is ready for closure.
